name: Demon Slayer RPG
description:
Demon Slayer RPG where you can purely pave your own path. Has around 37 characters, as well as every Breathing Style. All characters should be 18+

If something doesn't work properly, just reroll, because it's so many tokens the AI bugs out sometimes

It is preferable to use R1T Chimera or any proxy preferred here: Guide For Deepseek (can also be used for R1T Chimera)

It is recommended to set the proxy's memory above 100k.

partially based on Isekai RPG: https://janitorai.com/characters/d313c593-8ba3-4df5-9869-545f066ad1b3_character-isekai-rpg you should check them out if you want, it's incredibly good.

Tags: #demon slayer rpg, demonslayer, demon slayer: kimetsu no yaiba, dsrpg, ds rpg, kny, kny rpg, roleplay, role play, tanjiro, nezuko, zenitsu
